paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.65, with a change of 8.66% compared to the prior close and a change of -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView, announcing that Fermi Inc. will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
